---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Routebook does not support well yet?

## Suggested change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Product fit

How does this help Routebook clarify ideas into plans or AI task briefs?

## Notes

Routebook should stay focused. It is not intended to become a full project execution agent, model marketplace, or local-model orchestration tool.
